title: The Treason Show Festival Special
description: Brighton’s very own award-winning topical sketch comedy troupe are back with their slick, fast-paced satirical sideswipes at the great and good. If you like your humour topical with a twist and your songs with a satirical bite, then you’ll love this much loved Brighton company. This slick, fast-paced punchline driven show is crafted by a team of over 30 writers and performed by Brighton's finest comedic talent. With its unique blend of satirical comedy, local references, festival satire and toe-tapping parodies, this is a fringe 'don't miss' show.
content_warnings: Warning: May contain satire! (Not suitable for the hard of thinking
